title: Community Food Support
description: Monthly support to vulnerable families in Eldoret and surrounding areas. We provide food packages to those in need.

title: Church Building Project
description: Building a new sanctuary to accommodate our growing congregation. The project includes a main hall, Sunday school rooms, and fellowship area.

title: Leadership Training
description: Raising workers for ministry through our biblical training programs. We equip leaders for churches across the region.

title: Youth Empowerment
description: Empowering young people with skills and spiritual foundation for a brighter future.
